summary: Iteration 46 testing complete. All 7 requested changes verified working: 1) Manche auto-advance in 1vs1 (no MANCHE SUCCESSIVA button), 2) 'Aggiorna' button removed from challenges board replaced with 'Storico', 3) Test users deleted (only 6 real users remain), 4) Player popup has 'Visita Studio' button with full studio view, 5) Poster cards 50% smaller (lg:grid-cols-10), 6) Pre-Ingaggio page loads without crashing (GENRES_LIST import fixed), 7) Release notes v0.103 exists. Fixed one critical bug: popupView state not defined in TopNavbar causing crash when clicking player nicknames.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 changes from v0.103 are working. Fixed a bug where 'popupView' state was not defined in TopNavbar - added const [popupView, setPopupView] = useState('stats') at line 109. The player popup with 'Visita Studio' button now works correctly. The studio view shows: Box Office, Film count, Average Quality, Genre breakdown, Best Film, All Films grid. Grid layout uses lg:grid-cols-10 for 50% smaller posters (10 cols on desktop). Pre-Engagement page loads correctly with GENRES_LIST imported from constants. Challenges page has 'Storico' button (History) instead of 'Aggiorna' (Refresh). Manche auto-advances after each round with 3s delay.
